summary: Completed comprehensive testing of EDGE certification document management platform. All core features working correctly including project management, file upload, AI processing with GPT-4o, and EDGE status reporting.

ui_bugs.issue: File input element is hidden and requires JavaScript simulation for testing
ui_bugs.workaround: File upload works correctly via drag-and-drop or click on upload zone

passed_tests: Dashboard loads with sidebar, stats, and project grid
Create new project via dialog with name and typology selection
Project appears in dashboard and sidebar after creation
Navigate to project detail page by clicking project card
Project detail shows all three tabs: Archivos, Datos Extraidos, Estado EDGE
File upload functionality works (via drag-and-drop simulation)
File appears in files table with pending status
AI processing button appears and functions correctly
GPT-4o AI processing classifies files into EDGE categories
Extracted Data tab shows processed files with technical data
Export Excel button is present and clickable
EDGE Status tab shows category cards and measures breakdown
Missing documents detection works (identified missing Fotografia for EEM01)
Responsive design works on mobile viewport
All backend API endpoints (12/12 tests passed)
